blended.narrative: Welch Village is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 15 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: flurries, highs of 27°F, winds around 21 mph.
